description: Canonical control-command normalization + stop recognition, shared by core/contract.py and mobile/lib/contract.dart. 'normalize' pins normalize_command (lowercase, drop non a-z/space, collapse spaces, trim). 'is_stop' pins is_stop_command against the shared stop-class set {stop, cancel, cancel that, quiet, stop talking, be quiet}. Mode/confirm/deny commands are config-driven and desktop-only, so they are deliberately NOT stop commands here.
